calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. MICHAEL SHEPARD, Esq. of King & Spalding LLP (tel: 415-318-1200) for Petitioner.
Atty. CHRISTOPHER YOUNG, Esq. of The Office of the Attorney General of California (tel: 415-510-3554) for Respondent (via Zoom videoconference).

Hearing Re: PETITIONER APRIL MYRES' Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus.

Matter argued and submitted. Counsel Shepard requests the Court issue a statement of decision. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order denying Petitioner's petition for writ of administrative mandate (see signed order for complete ruling). Judgment signed. (302/RBU)*****
